command:
# Add early drop in raw table (PREROUTING) for spoofed IP-in-IP.
# Proto 4 (ipencap). Source inside 192.168.128.0/17 but dest outside -> drop.
if ! iptables-nft-save | grep -q 'lke:spoof-protection'; then
  iptables-nft -t raw \
    -I PREROUTING 1 \
    -p 4 \
    -s 192.168.128.0/17 ! -d 192.168.128.0/17 \
    -m comment --comment "lke:spoof-protection" \
    -j DROP
fi
initContainers.name: spoof-protection
